analysis_summary.description: The game uses SpawnTileEffectHandler for thrown projectiles like grenades. This handler spawns tile-based effects (fire, poison, explosions) in an area of effect pattern. The visual projectile is handled by ArcProjectile which creates a parabolic trajectory.

SpawnTileEffect_Template_Fields.name: EffectToSpawn
SpawnTileEffect_Template_Fields.description: Reference to the tile effect template to instantiate (e.g., fire, poison gas)

SpawnTileEffect_Template_Fields.name: ChanceAtCenter
SpawnTileEffect_Template_Fields.description: Base percentage chance (0-100) for effect spawn at center tile. Default: 100

SpawnTileEffect_Template_Fields.name: ChancePerTileFromCenter
SpawnTileEffect_Template_Fields.description: Percentage modifier per tile distance from center. Can be negative for falloff

SpawnTileEffect_Template_Fields.name: DelayWithDistance
SpawnTileEffect_Template_Fields.description: Visual delay multiplier for cascade animation effect (ripple from center)

SpawnTileEffectHandler_Fields.name: OwnerSkill
SpawnTileEffectHandler_Fields.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler

ArcProjectile_Fields.name: TargetPos
ArcProjectile_Fields.description: World position of the target (adjusted with offset)

ArcProjectile_Fields.name: StartPos
ArcProjectile_Fields.description: World position where projectile was launched from

ArcProjectile_Fields.name: FlightDuration
ArcProjectile_Fields.description: Total time in seconds for projectile to reach target

ArcProjectile_Fields.name: OwnerSkill
ArcProjectile_Fields.description: Reference to the skill that spawned this projectile

ArcProjectile_Fields.name: IsTargetReached
ArcProjectile_Fields.description: Flag set when projectile arrives at destination

ArcProjectile_Fields.name: Direction
ArcProjectile_Fields.description: Normalized direction vector from start to target

ArcProjectile_Fields.name: TotalDistance
ArcProjectile_Fields.description: Euclidean distance from start to target position

ArcProjectileData_Fields.name: TrailScale
ArcProjectileData_Fields.description: Scale of particle trail effect. Default: 1.0

ArcProjectileData_Fields.name: EnableTrail
ArcProjectileData_Fields.description: Whether to show particle trail. Default: true

ArcProjectileData_Fields.name: InitialRotation
ArcProjectileData_Fields.description: Initial rotation offset for projectile model

ArcProjectileData_Fields.name: RotateToTarget
ArcProjectileData_Fields.description: Whether projectile rotates to face target direction

ArcProjectileData_Fields.name: HeightScale
ArcProjectileData_Fields.description: Multiplier for arc apex height. Default: 1.0

ArcProjectileData_Fields.name: UseDistanceCurve
ArcProjectileData_Fields.description: Whether to use animation curve for distance-based height

ArcProjectileData_Fields.name: DistanceHeightCurve
ArcProjectileData_Fields.description: Curve mapping normalized distance to height modifier

ArcProjectileData_Fields.name: UseTimeCurve
ArcProjectileData_Fields.description: Whether to use time-based animation curve

ApplySkillTileEffect_Template_Fields.name: SkillTemplate
ApplySkillTileEffect_Template_Fields.description: Attack/damage skill to apply when triggered

ApplySkillTileEffect_Template_Fields.name: SoundID
ApplySkillTileEffect_Template_Fields.description: Sound effect to play on trigger

ApplySkillTileEffect_Template_Fields.name: RemoveOnTrigger
ApplySkillTileEffect_Template_Fields.description: Whether effect is one-shot (removed after first trigger)

ApplySkillTileEffectHandler_Fields.name: OwningTile
ApplySkillTileEffectHandler_Fields.description: The tile this effect is attached to

ApplySkillTileEffectHandler_Fields.name: Delay
ApplySkillTileEffectHandler_Fields.description: Frames to wait before effect activates

key_functions.name: SpawnTileEffectHandler.Apply_WithProbability
key_functions.description: Core tile effect spawning logic. Calculates spawn chance based on distance, uses PseudoRandom for RNG, creates or refreshes tile effects.

key_functions.name: SpawnTileEffectHandler.OnApply
key_functions.description: Event callback for skill application. Triggers immediate spawn if Event=0 (OnUse).

key_functions.name: SpawnTileEffectHandler.OnTileChanged
key_functions.description: Movement trigger. Spawns effect when Event=1 (OnTileChanged).

key_functions.name: SpawnTileEffectHandler.OnDeath
key_functions.description: Death trigger. Spawns effect when Event=2 (OnDeath).

key_functions.name: ArcProjectile.SetTarget
key_functions.description: Initializes arc trajectory, calculates flight path, direction, and duration.

key_functions.name: ArcProjectile.OnUpdate
key_functions.description: Per-frame update. Calculates parabolic position using normalized time and height curves.

key_functions.name: ApplySkillTileEffectHandler.ApplySkill
key_functions.description: Applies skill damage/effect to entity. Validates condition, plays sound, calls Skill.Use with flags=0x13.

key_functions.name: Skill.SpawnProjectile
key_functions.description: Creates visual projectile for ranged attacks. Uses object pooling system.

key_functions.name: Skill.Use
key_functions.description: Main skill execution. Processes handlers, deducts AP, triggers reactions.

key_discoveries.details: Grenades use a two-part system: ArcProjectile for visual trajectory, SpawnTileEffectHandler for AOE damage. The projectile is purely visual while the handler manages actual game effects.
Tile effects use ChanceAtCenter + (distance * ChancePerTileFromCenter) formula for spawn probability. Uses PseudoRandom.NextTry for consistent RNG across network.
DelayWithDistance field creates visual ripple effect. GetMaxAoeDelay calculates: AoeRadius * DelayWithDistance * 1.5f for animation sync.
Event field controls when effect activates: 0=OnUse (grenade impact), 1=OnTileChanged (fire trail), 2=OnDeath (exploding unit). ApplySkillTileEffect has additional TriggerFlags for entry/exit events.
ApplySkillTileEffect.GetSkillInstance uses static Dictionary<SkillTemplate,Skill> cache for performance. Avoids creating duplicate skill instances.
PooledProjectile component enables object reuse. BaseProjectileData.CreateProjectile checks for pool availability before instantiation.
Skill.Use flag 0x13 (binary 10011) = ForceApply|FromTileEffect. Bypasses normal usability checks when triggered by tile effects.
ITacticalCondition interface at template+0xD8 allows custom target validation. ApplySkill resolves interface via il2cpp_interface_resolve_slot for polymorphic condition evaluation.
